mapper.sql: id, type, reference_id, device_code, software_pn, config_word_version, start_byte, start_bit, config_word_value, depend_device, depend_device_software_pn, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_config_word ( id, type, reference_id, device_code, software_pn, config_word_version, start_byte, start_bit, config_word_value, depend_device, depend_device_software_pn, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{type}, #{referenceId}, #{deviceCode}, #{softwarePn}, #{configWordVersion}, #{startByte}, #{startBit}, #{configWordValue}, #{dependDevice}, #{dependDeviceSoftwarePn}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_config_word ( id, type, reference_id, device_code, software_pn, config_word_version, start_byte, start_bit, config_word_value, depend_device, depend_device_software_pn, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.type}, #{item.referenceId}, #{item.deviceCode}, #{item.softwarePn}, #{item.configWordVersion}, #{item.startByte}, #{item.startBit}, #{item.configWordValue}, #{item.dependDevice}, #{item.dependDeviceSoftwarePn}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_config_word t SET
t.type = #{type},
t.reference_id = #{referenceId},
t.device_code = #{deviceCode},
t.software_pn = #{softwarePn},
t.config_word_version = #{configWordVersion},
t.start_byte = #{startByte},
t.start_bit = #{startBit},
t.config_word_value = #{configWordValue},
t.depend_device = #{dependDevice},
t.depend_device_software_pn = #{dependDeviceSoftwarePn},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_config_word t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_config_word t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_config_word t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_config_word t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
